package repository

import "context"

// AppIdentitiesRepository is a draft repository boundary for appIdentities.

type AppIdentitiesRepository interface {
	List(ctx context.Context, query AppIdentitiesQuery) ([]AppIdentity, error)

type AppIdentitiesQuery struct {
